Careers

Home » Careers

Join The Cutting Edge of Photonics

Optiwave is shaping the future with the next generation of photonics software, and we’d like your help! We’re always looking for talented and ambitious professionals who are ready to push the boundaries of optics.

Make a Real Impact

Joining Optiwave allows you to make a meaningful difference with your expertise. We empower and encourage our engineers to achieve new heights.

Continuous Development

Work in a fast-paced environment to develop your skillset, and supercharge your growth with new opportunities around every corner.

Compensation & Benefits

Enjoy a rewarding career with an organization that respects and rewards your skills with a competitive compensation package.

Browse our open positions below
Photonics Software Engineer

Job Description/Responsibilities

We are looking for a candidate to join the software development team working on expanding the capabilities of OptiSPICE and improving product integration.

Summary of responsibilities:

Contribute to software development of OptiSPICE and OptiSPICE Plugin
Create and integrate simulation tools for building optoelectronic compact models
Work with 3rd parties on product development
